targets.expr: nomad_job_name:traefik DownstreamStatus:~"^2.." | stats by (host) count() as count
nomad_job_name:traefik DownstreamStatus:~"^3.." | stats by (host) count() as count
nomad_job_name:traefik DownstreamStatus:~"^4.." | stats by (host) count() as count
nomad_job_name:traefik DownstreamStatus:~"^5.." | stats by (host) count() as count
nomad_job_name:traefik | stats by (host) avg(Duration) as avg_ns
nomad_job_name:traefik | stats by (host) quantile(0.95, Duration) as p95_ns
